title: Speciality Restaurants Global Group is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Speciality Restaurants Global Group is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Speciality Restaurants Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Chennai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Speciality Restaurants Global Group:
Speciality Restaurants Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Speciality Restaurants Global Group!
